title: Build with AI Wrocław: Architecting the Future of Products
detail: 6-day intensive, cross-functional Product Creators, AI across SDLC, ends in Grand Hackathon.

title: Product Design, Scope & MVP
detail: Persona, problem statement, IT project lifecycle, Design Thinking, SDLC, BPMN, Event Storming, Kanban.

title: UI/UX & AI-Native Design Systems
detail: Digital accessibility, AI-powered design systems, designs into products via MCP servers.

title: Scaling Frontend Architecture & AI-Assisted Debugging
detail: Nx monorepos, modern Angular, ng-diagram, AI-powered debugging.

title: Fullstack, Architecture & LLM Engineering
detail: Angular↔NestJS, Docker/Sequelize, evaluation scoreboards, autonomous agentic loops.

title: Deployment, Scale & Optimization
detail: Building MCP servers, pytriz package, Google Cloud deploy, CI/CD.

title: Grand Hackathon
detail: Cross-functional teams design, build, and launch a complete product. Judged finale.

title: Uniwersytet Ekonomiczny we Wrocławiu
detail: 118/120 Komandorska, Wrocław 53-345.

title: Grand Hackathon problem statement
detail: UNKNOWN — not published on the web page. Resolve via Discord.

title: Judging criteria & weights
detail: RESOLVED via Discord #ewaluacja-punktów (Adrian Romański, 2026-06-30). 100 pts = 5 pillars x 20: (1) Product Design & MVP [Day1], (2) UI/UX & A11Y [Day2], (3) Angular/NX/Debugging [Day3], (4) Fullstack NestJS/Architecture/LLM Eng [Day4], (5) Deployment/Scale/Optimization [Day5]. Panel acts as Client+Investor.

title: Criterion Zero (gate)
detail: App MUST fulfill the assigned domain task; AI/algorithms must return correct, sensible results. If it doesn't solve the assigned problem, project fails Client verification before points count.

title: Prizes
detail: STILL UNKNOWN — not published in scraped channels.

title: Deliverables & demo format
detail: PARTIAL: judged as a pitch to a Client+Investor panel; product must be working, deployed, market-ready. Exact demo length / repo/URL requirements not yet posted.

title: Assigned per-team domain task
detail: STILL UNKNOWN per team. Adrian Romański (2026-07-01) plans an official GDG website listing all teams + their hackathon task.

title: Discord channel map
detail: Kanały Ogólne: rozmowy, meme, zdjecia. Warsztaty: dzien-1..5 (+ -rozmowy, -prezentacje). Hackathon: harmonogram (empty), ewaluacja-punktów. Zespoly-Zakwalifikowane: teams-gr-lorikeets (ours, private), lista, prezentacja-druzyn, teams-analisis. Zespoly: teams.

name: Team Lorikeets
detail: Our team. Members seen: Adrian Romański, Greg Radzio, Rafał Karpicki, mateusz.chabiniec.

name: Competing teams
detail: Seksowne Gnojki, Rosellas (SYZYGY: Angular/Nx), Giggs (Vue/Angular/NestJS), 404 Terror, Sum Ting Wong, AI4B, Human Agents (incl. judge Dawid Perdek), Deep Blue, The Rectangles.

title: Planned official GDG hackathon website
detail: Adrian Romański building a site listing attendees, teams, and each team's hackathon task. Watch for URL — will publish domain tasks.
